competitor_changes: client portal with commenting and deliverable approval
current_tool_status: manual refresh required for Gantt chart view
pricing_delta: FlowBoard is £50 more expensive (£340) than TaskBridge (£290)

notes: UK data residency not available may impact FlowBoard adoption in the UK
FlowBoard's native time-tracking may reduce ChronoLog usage and associated costs
